jokers.name: Trading Card
jokers.description: If your first discard of the round has only 1 card, earn $3 and destroy it

jokers.name: Green Joker
jokers.description: +1 Mult per hand played, -1 Mult per discard

jokers.name: Raised Fist
jokers.description: Adds double the rank of the lowest-ranked card held in hand to Mult

jokers.name: Abstract Joker
jokers.description: +3 Mult for each Joker

jokers.name: The Idol
jokers.description: Each played card of the chosen rank and suit gives X2 Mult when scored; card changes every round
